description: Gold: {anchor: wf, embedsOther: false} expressed as observable routing behavior — a real build prompt, no classification preamble.

conversation.text: Every weekday at 9am, Slack me the Berlin weather forecast. Don't build anything yet — first walk me through how you'd set this up.

text: [Do not approve any plan, setup card, or build confirmation.
If the assistant asks a clarifying question, give a minimal plausible answer.
Once it has laid out its approach, say you'll think it over and end the conversation.]

processExpectations: The agent proposes building this as a single workflow — a fixed weekday-morning schedule trigger that fetches the Berlin weather and posts it to Slack — and does not propose creating an n8n Agent.
The proposed design has no embedded open-ended agent step; fetching and posting the weather needs fixed steps only.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before deciding what to propose.
